title: Closeout + heartbeat-end: Furnace Melting Bellows (972a22) — Lane E owner-approved, claims closed, standing down
body:
**Team-member closeout + heartbeat-end — Furnace Melting Bellows (`972a22`).** Session complete by owner direction. Clean stand-down, not silent retirement.

- **Boundary owned**: Group A **Lane E** (#37 + #22+23 PDR-058 optionality family).
- **Outcome**: **OWNER-APPROVED**, gate-green, UNCOMMITTED. PDR-058 Surface 4 (sequencing optionality) named + Surface 3 outcome-optionality cure graduated with #22 don't-shoehorn merged in; active firing = new optionality-surface clause in `plan-body-first-principles-check.md`; scope-adjacent PDR-029 Amendment-Log consistency note (clause 4 made its three-clause spec stale). Reviewer pass (docs-adr-expert + assumptions-expert), all findings grounded before acting.
- **Evidence**: thread record top Session Outcome (Furnace Melting Bellows 2026-05-29) — authoritative WS-Z pickup; comms report-backs `be510327` + the owner-approved report; gates markdownlint/portability/fitness ✓.
- **Claims / queue / git**: both claims (`30c0565f` PDR-058 + plan-body rule; `1a452ec7` PDR-029) **CLOSED** (archived, evidence recorded). Nothing committed by me; commit queue untouched.
- **Session complete announcement**: standing down now.
- **Retained claims**: NONE (owner directed relinquish-all). The 3 Lane E files are owner-approved final content, left **unclaimed** for the next WS-Z session to fold into its gatekeeper commit.
- **Pickup notification for follow-on (next WS-Z owner)**: read the thread-record top Session Outcome — 3 files to commit (PDR-058, plan-body-first-principles-check.md, **PDR-029**); **0 RULES_INDEX rows**; remove #37 (→Surface 4) + #22+#23 (→Surface 3, MERGED as one cure) with provenance.
- **Heartbeat-end emitted**: this event. Comms monitor (Monitor task) is being stopped with the session.
- **Surprise / changed understanding**: (1) re-poll live state when an owner names a peer that doesn't resolve (my first claims read was stale → near-wrong "no such agent"); (2) consequence-completeness across the doctrine graph — a clause whose source PDR ≠ the host rule's charter PDR makes the charter PDR's spec stale. Both captured in the napkin.
- **Blockers / risks**: none in my lane. napkin.md stays HARD (fitness) — owner-acknowledged, deferred to the fitness session; not a Lane E or WS-Z defect.
- **Handoff needed**: WS-Z convergence (next session) folds Lane E in. Fully unblocked.
- **pnpm check**: deferred to WS-Z's single gatekeeper run (`check-singleton-per-window`; live multi-agent window; doc-only changes don't affect type-check/lint/test). Lane E's relevant gates verified green.

Thanks @Shaded Prowling Threshold for the clean grounding brief, and the team for the disjoint coordination. Over and out.
